Interpretation_EN: Slow-history and high-dispersal strategy group with longer generation time and larger body size.
Interpretation_CN: 慢生活史-高扩散组：世代时间较长、体型偏大、扩散能力较高。

Interpretation_EN: Thermally broader, habitat-generalist and higher-fecundity strategy group.
Interpretation_CN: 热耐受较宽-生境泛化-较高繁殖输出组：热幅较宽、生境广、窝卵数偏高。

Interpretation_EN: Range-restricted, low-dispersal and climatically narrower strategy group.
Interpretation_CN: 地方性/专性策略组：分布范围较小、扩散较低、气候耐受较窄。
